race.description: Phillip Rieck - Member Appreciation Mdn Hcp
race.comment: First starter CAPE COD (3) is by I Am Invincible from the three-time Group One winner Shoals who has produced the G3 winner Isthmus. Won a recent trial at the Beaumont track in good style. From the powerful Messara/Gavranich stable. Looks a ready-made racehorse. TERRA LUMINA (4) settled worse than midfield before working home late to finish fifth over 1000m at Kembla last start. Draws the coveted inside gate and should be cherry ripe at the third run back. RUN THE RED LIGHT (10) started at cricket-score odds but managed to work home into third when resuming over this course and distance three weeks ago. Big chance at another top three finish under similar conditions. FINAL GIFT (9) began awkwardly and couldn't quicken in heavy going here last start. In the mix with a cleaner getaway. ARIANA REIGN (6) is trialling well and looks ready for a bright start to her career.
